title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services:
Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store Holdings Services!
